zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon於1428年出生在比利時海瑙特波蒙特時，他的父親Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III33歲，母親Jeanne de Canny28歲。他和Jeanne de Saarbrücken至少有2個兒子。他去世於1500年2月7日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯享年72歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon于1428年出生在比利时海瑙特波蒙特时，他的父亲Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III33岁，母亲Jeanne de Canny28岁。他和Jeanne de Saarbrücken至少有2个儿子。他去世于1500年2月7日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯享年72岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Christophe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon was born in 1428, in Beaumont, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III, was 33 and his mother, Jeanne de Canny, was 28. He had at least 2 sons with Jeanne de Saarbrücken. He died on 7 February 1500, in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon est né en 1428, à Beaumont, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Canny, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Jeanne de Saarbrücken. Il est décédé le 7 février 1500, à Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon 1428 in Beaumont, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III 33 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Canny 28. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Saarbrücken mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 7. Februar 1500 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon è nato il nel 1428 nel Beaumont, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Canny, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Jeanne de Saarbrücken. Morì il 7 febbraio 1500, nel Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbanconが1428年にベルギーヘイナトビーウモントで生まれた時，父Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles IIIは33歳，母Jeanne de Cannyは28歳であった。彼はJeanne de Saarbrückenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1500年2月7日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンアルレスで72歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon(이)가 1428년 벨기에 하인오트 보몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Canny(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Saarbrücken(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 2월 7일 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 알레스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon nasceu em 1428, em Beaumont, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Canny, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Jeanne de Saarbrücken. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1500, em Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon родился в 1428 г. в местности бомонт, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Jean de Barbançon de Fagnolles III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Canny, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Jeanne de Saarbrücken. Он умер 7 февраля 1500 г. в местности арльс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Jeanne de Saarbrücken. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1500, en Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
